case_title: WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC VS. CACHE MORA COLVIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-15-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 TO ALLOW FOR PLAINTIFF TO TIMELY SUBMIT A REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM.
